allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Remove platformdirs and tomli-w dependencies, make questionary optional

Replace platformdirs with stdlib os/sys for config directory resolution.
Switch config format from TOML to JSON, eliminating both tomli-w and
tomllib imports in favor of stdlib json. Move questionary from core
dependencies to an optional [interactive] extra since it is only used
for the download interactive command and was already lazy-loaded.

Reduces runtime dependencies from 6 to 3 \(httpx, rich, typer\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
